name: Cultist Fanatic
languages: Two languages (usually Common and one other)

traits.name: Dark Devotion
traits.description: The fanatic has Advantage on saving throws against being Charmed or Frightened.

actions.name: Pact Blade
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic or Psychic damage (the fanatic's choice).

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description: The fanatic casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12): At Will: Light, Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy; 1/Day Each: Command, Inflict Wounds, Shield of Faith

tactical_info.environment: Cult leadership, dark temples, ritual sites, corrupted settlements
tactical_info.tactics: Uses spellcasting for battlefield control, enhances melee with pact blade, commands lesser cultists
tactical_info.weaknesses: Limited spell slots, moderate armor class, vulnerable when isolated from followers
